sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39054" key="e)pignampto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιγναμπτ-ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n39054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">curved, twisted</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἕλικες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg005.perseus-grc1:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
